info.name: EC.DATA API
info.description:
REST API multi-tenant para plataformas e-commerce / IoT.

Variables:
- baseUrl: URL base de la API
- token: JWT access token (obtener via Login)
- refreshToken: JWT refresh token

query.description: true = mostrar todos los sitios accesibles
true = solo sitios sin jerarquía asignada
Buscar por nombre o serial (max 200 chars)

body.raw:
{
  "organizationId": "ORG-XXXXX",
  "siteId": null,
  "name": "New Device",
  "description": "",
  "uuid": null,
  "deviceTypeId": 1,
  "brandId": null,
  "modelId": null,
  "serverId": null,
  "networkId": null,
  "licenseId": null,
  "validityPeriodId": null,
  "serialNumber": "SN-12345",
  "firmwareVersion": null,
  "ipAddress": null,
  "macAddress": null,
  "topic": null,
  "locationName": null,
  "physicalLocation": null,
  "electricalLocation": null,
  "latitude": null,
  "longitude": null,
  "city": null,
  "timezone": "America/Lima",
  "installationDate": null,
  "metadata": {},
  "isActive": true
}

query.description: logo | image | document | firmware | backup | export | import | attachment | other
IDs de variables separados por coma
ISO timestamp - solo datos más nuevos que esta fecha

body.raw:
{
  "name": "New Dashboard",
  "description": "",
  "icon": null,
  "isPublic": false,
  "size": "FREE",
  "positioning": "AUTO",
  "customWidth": null,
  "customHeight": null,
  "settings": {
    "forceK": false,
    "backgroundImage": null
  },
  "templateId": null
}
